overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist poling a wooden boat through a historic Middle Eastern canal city. The scene features warm golden hour lighting, mud-brick architecture, stone bridges, and transitions from narrow enclosed waterways to open palm-lined canals.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canal between mud-brick buildings with loading crane

events.description: another boat with a poler appears on the right side of the canal

agents.ego_description: standing on wooden boat poling steadily through narrow canal between tall mud-brick buildings

notable_agents.action: poling a small boat in the same direction on the right side of the canal

entered.detail: long narrow wooden boat with ornate carvings on the bow
tall historic building with wooden balconies and weathered mud-brick walls
multi-story stone and mud structure with small windows
large wooden lifting mechanism with ropes and beams extending over the canal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a hooded character poling a wooden canoe through a narrow canal. The waterway is flanked by tall mud-brick buildings with wooden balconies, and a large wooden crane structure looms ahead. Another boat with an NPC poler appears on the right side around the 6-second mark, traveling in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal passing under stone arch bridge

events.description: boat enters the shadow beneath the stone bridge arch
boat emerges from under the bridge into bright direct sunlight causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: poling the boat under a low stone bridge, ducking slightly as the character passes through the arch

entered.detail: large stone bridge with arched opening and decorative stonework spanning the canal

segments.scene_description: The boat approaches and passes underneath a substantial stone bridge, transitioning from bright sunlight into shadow and back into light. The canal remains narrow with mud-brick buildings now visible in the distance beyond the bridge. The wooden crane from the previous segment disappears from view as the boat moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal with wooden docks and moored boats

events.description: passing wooden docks with NPCs sitting and standing on the left bank
slight navigation adjustment to avoid docked boats on the left side

agents.ego_description: poling past wooden docks where NPCs are gathered, carefully navigating between moored boats along the canal edge

notable_agents.action: sitting on the wooden dock watching boats pass by
standing on an elevated stone platform overlooking the canal

entered.detail: wooden pier structures with posts and ropes extending into the water
small wooden boats tied up along the left bank
large fortified gate with archway and hanging banners visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The boat continues through the canal passing by wooden docks on the left where NPCs are sitting and standing. Several moored boats are tied along the bank, requiring slight navigation adjustments. In the distance ahead, a large fortified city gate with hanging banners becomes visible, marking the transition to the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined waterway passing through city gate

events.description: passing through the large stone city gate with hanging banners into a more open area
canal opens up with dense palm trees lining both banks and more vegetation visible

agents.ego_description: poling through the city gate into a wider, sunlit canal surrounded by dense palm trees and open skies

entered.detail: massive stone archway with decorative banners hanging from the top
tall date palm trees lining the left bank creating a tropical atmosphere
tall date palm trees lining the right bank
rusted metal framework structure partially submerged on the right bank

segments.scene_description: The boat passes through the imposing city gate, emerging into a much wider and more open canal lined with dense palm trees on both sides. The architecture transitions from enclosed urban to a more tropical, open waterway with rusted metal ruins visible on the right bank. The lighting remains golden and warm as the boat continues toward a distant bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow urban waterway that gradually opens into a wide, palm-lined canal. It begins with a hooded character poling a wooden canoe past tall mud-brick buildings and a looming wooden crane, passing another boat traveling in the same direction. As the boat glides forward, it passes underneath a substantial stone bridge, momentarily shifting from bright sunlight into shadow before emerging back into the light. The scene then flows past wooden docks where NPCs gather and moored boats line the banks, before the camera focuses on a large fortified city gate with hanging banners ahead. Finally, the boat passes through the imposing gate and emerges into a broad, open waterway flanked by dense palm trees and rusted metal ruins under a warm golden glow.
